title: NimbleBrain Host Extension
description: Schema for the `ai.nimblebrain/host` MCP `_meta` extension — how an MCP server declares its UI integration (placements, briefing) in the NimbleBrain host shell. Carried in the server's descriptor `_meta`: an MCPB manifest (bundles) or a ServerDetail (fleet connectors). The `ui://` app resources themselves are standard MCP Apps; this extension only declares where they are placed.

host_version.description: Host manifest schema version. 1.1 adds host_capabilities.

host_capabilities.description: NimbleBrain host capabilities this bundle requires or prefers. Keys are vendor-namespaced extension keys (e.g. "ai.nimblebrain/host-resources") matching the platform's ClientCapabilities.extensions advertisement. Each value declares the bundle's requirements for that capability.

name.description: Display name shown in the sidebar and app list.

category.description: RESERVED — not currently consumed by the host (grouping/briefing prioritization is not yet wired to it). Free-form string, tolerated for back-compat; do not rely on it. Slated for removal — see nimblebrain#503.

resourceUri.description: ui:// URI for the main view.

HostCapabilityRequirement.description: Bundle's requirement against one NimbleBrain host capability. `required: true` makes the platform refuse install if the capability is missing; `required: false` (or omitted) means the bundle prefers it but adapts at runtime via SDK availability checks plus structured tool-error fallback.

required.description: When true, the platform must advertise this capability in ClientCapabilities.extensions or install is refused.

slot.description: Shell slot to fill: "sidebar" (core nav), "sidebar.<group>" (named group, e.g. "sidebar.apps"), "sidebar.bottom" (pinned), "settings" (a settings section — declare settings as a placement, not a separate object), or "main" (page content). Unknown slots are dropped by the host, never fatal.

resourceUri.description: ui:// resource URI served by this MCP server.

priority.description: Sort order within the slot. Lower values appear first. Default: 100.

label.description: Human-readable label for sidebar items and tabs.

size.description: Size hint for the slot renderer.

BriefingBlock.description: Briefing declaration — how this app contributes to the daily briefing.

priority.description: Relative priority for ordering this app's facets in the briefing.

facets.description: Summary dimensions this app contributes to the briefing.

BriefingFacet.description: A single briefing facet — one dimension of summary data.

label.description: Human-readable label for the briefing section.

type.description: Facet type: attention (needs action), upcoming (coming soon), activity (happened), delta (state change), kpi (headline number).

entity.description: Upjack entity name to query (resolved from upjack manifest).

resource.description: briefing:// URI — app computes its own summary via MCP resource read.

tool.description: MCP tool name to call at briefing time (e.g., 'newsapi__search_news').

tool_input.description: Arguments to pass when calling the tool (e.g., { "query": "AI", "page_size": 5 }).

query.description: MongoDB-style query filter over entity data (parsed by sift.js). Supports $eq, $ne, $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte, $in, $exists. String values like "${today}" are resolved at runtime.

metric.description: Aggregation type: count entities, sum a field, or list entities.

highlight.description: JPath condition for what changed (for delta facets).

description.description: Human-readable fallback description of what this facet shows.
